assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddServerSideSessions() on the IdentityServer builder
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows AddServerSideSessions() as the required call to enable server-side sessions.

assertions.assertion: AddOperationalStore is configured with EnableTokenCleanup set to true
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows EnableTokenCleanup = true in operational store options.

assertions.assertion: AddOperationalStore options set RemoveConsumedTokens to true
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md documents RemoveConsumedTokens option and shows it in code examples.

assertions.assertion: AddServerSideSessions is called before or alongside AddOperationalStore, not after it without the operational store
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows the correct ordering pattern with AddServerSideSessions() before AddOperationalStore().
